services.name: Executive Diagnostics
services.summary: Whole-body screening and biomarker review built for early clarity, not reactive treatment.
services.detail: A same-day pathway covering imaging, blood analysis, cardiac screening, and a physician debrief designed for busy professionals and complex family histories.

services.name: Regenerative Orthopedics
services.summary: High-touch care for joint, tendon, and recovery planning with surgical and non-surgical options.
services.detail: We combine imaging-led diagnosis, movement analysis, and evidence-based regenerative therapies to reduce uncertainty before committing to invasive treatment.

services.name: Neuro Restoration
services.summary: Integrated neurological evaluation for cognitive fatigue, migraines, movement disorders, and recovery.
services.detail: Patients receive coordinated neurological review, diagnostics planning, and specialist case conferencing when symptoms cut across multiple systems.

services.name: Family Pediatrics
services.summary: Calm pediatric care with modern diagnostics, developmental support, and parent guidance.
services.detail: The pediatric pathway is structured to minimize stress in the room while still giving families direct access to modern screening, specialists, and follow-through.

specialists.name: Dr. Marcus Chen
specialists.title: Consultant Cardiologist
specialists.focus: Cardiometabolic screening, performance cardiology, preventive heart care

specialists.name: Dr. Sarah El-Baz
specialists.title: Lead Pediatrician
specialists.focus: Development, preventative family care, complex pediatric coordination

specialists.name: Dr. James Wilson
specialists.title: Orthopedic Surgeon
specialists.focus: Joint preservation, sports recovery, surgical planning

specialists.name: Dr. Lina Farouk
specialists.title: Aesthetic and Medical Dermatologist
specialists.focus: Medical dermatology, skin longevity, regenerative aesthetics

specialists.name: Dr. Daniel Hart
specialists.title: Clinical Lead, Sanctuary Program
specialists.focus: Complex case review, multi-specialty care plans, long-term prevention

testimonials.quote: The difference is not just the finish. They move quickly, explain clearly, and the handoffs between doctors actually work.
testimonials.author: Nadia K.

testimonials.quote: Our daughter went from scattered referrals to one clear plan in a week. That alone changed everything for our family.
testimonials.author: Michael R.

testimonials.quote: The clinic feels calm, but the care process is sharp. Every step had a reason and someone owned it.
testimonials.author: Evan T.
